title: Prejudice
questions: What images spring to mind when you hear the word 'prejudice'?
What kinds of prejudice exist in your country?
Why does prejudice occur?
What does your government do to fight prejudice?
Christian Bovee said: "The great obstacle to progress is prejudice." What do you think of this?
What is the answer to prejudice?
What's the worst form of prejudice you know of?
Have you ever suffered because of prejudice?
What would you do if prejudice was directed against you?
Would you act if you saw cases of prejudice?
What is prejudice?
What makes someone prejudiced?
Goldini said: "He who never leaves his country is full of prejudices." Do you agree with this?
Are men or women more likely to be prejudiced?
Do you know any people who have prejudices?
Do you think everyone in the world has prejudices?
Do you think prejudices would exist if sight didn't?
Should ways to reduce prejudices be taught in schools?
Do you think your county's leader is prejudiced?
Will the world be free of prejudices one day?
